title: v19 cycle 9 — 71-pillar P1 reduction wave (orchestrator session)
summary: Orchestrator session authoring the v19 plan + worklog + AGENTS.md refresh for the P1 reduction wave. v18 closed 47/47 P0 pillars (fleet mean 2.86); v19 targets 5 P1 pillars for Adequate→Solid upgrade (L50 Secrets Mgmt, L52 Encryption, L54 OIDC, L19 Perf Bench, L53 Pen Test). All 5 tracks identified, dependencies mapped, file lists drafted, success metrics set.

in_scope: Refresh AGENTS.md Wave Plan section from v17 → v19 (this session)
out_of_scope: Implement T1 (Vault plan) — docs work, week 1 of v19
Implement T2 (encryption mandate) — code + docs, week 2
Implement T3 (OIDC federation) — code + docs, week 2
Implement T4 (perf benchmarks) — heavy-runner only, week 1-2
Implement T5 (pen test roadmap) — docs work, week 1

created_this_session.purpose: v19 cycle 9 plan — P1 reduction wave scope, 5 tracks, dependencies, risk register, success metrics
This worklog — session log per ADR-015 v2.1 schema

created_this_session.change: Wave Plan section header refresh from 'v17 — current' to 'v19 — current'; reference v19 plan file

upstream: ADR-035 (Configra migration gates) — base for T2 (encryption mandate)
ADR-040 (test coverage gates per tier) — base for T4 (perf gate)
ADR-042 (security audit cadence) — base for T5 (pen test cadence)
downstream: T1 (Vault plan) → T2 (encryption mandate): T2 reuses the secrets-management-convention.md doc
T1 (Vault plan) → T3 (OIDC federation): T3 references Vault as identity provider
T2 (encryption mandate) + T3 (OIDC) → T4 (perf bench): T4 perf budget on pheno-config + pheno-port-adapter
T3 (OIDC) → T5 (pen test): T5 test harness uses OIDC client for federated auth testing

next_steps: Refresh AGENTS.md Wave Plan section (this session)
Commit + push v19 plan + worklog + AGENTS.md refresh to argis-extensions archive branch (this session)
Hand off T1 (Vault plan) to orchestrator subagent or execute directly next session
Hand off T2 (encryption mandate) after T1 ships
Hand off T3 (OIDC federation) after T1 + T2 ship
Hand off T4 (perf benchmarks) to heavy-runner subagent immediately (independent of T1-T3)
Hand off T5 (pen test roadmap) to orchestrator subagent or execute directly
71-pillar cycle 9 re-audit at end of v19 (week 3) — validates L50/L52/L54/L19/L53 score changes
